asOf: Weekend wrap — Sun, Jun 28 (Fri Jun 26 close)
headline: H1 closes on a split tape: Micron +15.7% wins the AI memory trade, Apple -6.6% loses the AI device bill; Nasdaq -4.5% on the week, BTC first sub-$60K close since Q3’24.

sentiment.reason: Friday’s session was a textbook dispersion tape: Micron ripped on AI memory scarcity while Apple sold the AI cost-curve story, and oil re-priced on Hormuz risk — index level barely moved but the underlying signal was risk-off into the long weekend.

movers.reason: FQ3 beat & raise ($41.46B rev, 84.6% GM) — memory scarcity story wins the day; bottleneck moves from compute to memory
MacBook/iPad price hike flags memory cost pressure hitting consumer hardware margins — worst day in over a year
AI complex contagion — Apple’s pricing move read as a tax on AI-end demand; dealers drag NVDA into the long weekend

news.headline: Micron +15.7% on $41.46B quarter, Apple -6.6% — AI cost curve splits the tape
news.context: Memory scarcity vs device cost pressure — bottleneck migrates from compute to memory. Picks-and-shovels wins, AI spenders lose into H2.

news.headline: Hormuz risk returns: Brent +2.1% to $75.26, WTI +2.2% to $71.92
news.context: Single-event risk in the Strait re-prices oil and reminds the tape that inflation is not gliding to 2%. Airlines and freight names under pressure Sunday evening.

news.headline: 10Y ends week at 4.38% after May Core PCE prints 3.4% YoY
news.context: Front-end futures still pricing 1 cut by year-end but 10Y refuses to rally — duration discipline matters into July CPI/Jobs.

news.headline: Russell reconstitution Friday adds SpaceX, ~62 names — $12.2T benchmarked
news.context: Closing-auction liquidity event complicates the real signal: index mechanics, not fresh conviction. Watch breadth Monday for clean read.

news.headline: VIX pushes to 19.6 as Asian reversal hits Friday morning
news.context: KOSPI tripped circuit breakers, SK Hynix -8%, Samsung -5% — global tech correction, not US-only. VIX9D vs VIX3M in mild backwardation.

options.thesis: VIX up into the long weekend with NQ -0.85% — front-week IV rich vs realized, dealer gamma flips negative below 25,200.
options.signal: Sell weekly QQQ put spreads (24,900/24,700), keep long VIX3M call calendars into July 11 CPI/Jobs combo

options.thesis: COR3M near cycle low at 9.90 — single-stock dispersion means index puts under-hedge concentrated AI risk.
options.signal: Long SPY put spread (7,300/7,200) + long single-stock puts on AAPL/NVDA into July 11 expiry, defined-risk basket

options.thesis: Skew flattening near 240 — call premium cheap relative to realized, Robotaxi narrative still priced into Aug.
options.signal: Sell ATM straddle Aug, keep OTM call upside (300C) funded by the sale; cheap convexity into earnings

options.thesis: IV crush setup after +15% rip — 30D IV ~92% vs HV ~65%, dealer flow turns two-way post-print.
options.signal: Sell MU weekly call spreads (160/175) against long stock, fade IV into mid-July as gamma normalizes

options.thesis: Unusual call sweep on XLE Jan 2027 110s — ~$8M notional Thursday/Friday; energy is the only green sector.
options.signal: Long XLE call calendar (Sep/Dec) to harvest time premium while keeping upside into Hormuz tail

takeaway: Index levels lie. The real tape is inside the AI complex — Micron won Friday, Apple lost it, and Asia paid the bill overnight. Dispersion is the only trade until COR3M normalizes. Watch Sunday’s futures open (6 PM ET) for whether the long-weekend gap holds.

asOf: Weekend wrap — Sat, Jun 27 (Fri Jun 26 close)
headline: H1 closes on a split tape: Micron +15.7% wins the AI trade, Apple -6.1% loses it; Nasdaq -4.5% on the week, BTC first sub-$60K close since Q3'24.

sentiment.reason: Index barely budged Friday but single-name dispersion was historic — Micron and Apple diverged ~22 points in one session, KOSPI tripped a circuit breaker, and BTC printed its first sub-$60K close since Q3'24.

movers.reason: FQ3 beat & raise on HBM3E demand — memory side of AI capex wins the day
Mid-cycle Mac/iPad price hike flags memory cost pressure flowing through to device margins
Xbox/hardware repricing as AI memory costs drag consumer hardware peers

news.headline: Micron +15.7%, Apple -6.1% in same session — AI cost chain splits
news.context: Memory winners vs device losers — dispersion theme, not index direction. COR3M near cycle low at 9.90 confirms decoupling.

news.headline: KOSPI -6%, Nikkei -5% as Asia tech catches down on Apple repricing
news.context: Overnight tape smeared into US: SK Hynix -8%, Samsung -5%, TSMC -2% — global tech correction, not US-only.

news.headline: WTI rebounds to $70.54 (+2.2%) on Oman cargo vessel incident
news.context: Hormuz transit improving but single-event risk still live — counter-trend bid into a soft tape.

news.headline: VIX pushes to 20.30 as Asian reversal hits US morning
news.context: VIX9D 17.92 vs VIX3M 20.33 — front-month in mild backwardation, term structure pricing more pain later.

news.headline: CME FedWatch prices ~47% September rate hike after cooler PCE
news.context: May Core PCE 0.45% m/m vs 0.50% est — disinflation printed, but market reads Fed as data-dependent hawk.

options.thesis: $124M delta-hedged block crossed print while spot fell 1.5% — desks harvesting fat vol into the long weekend.
options.signal: Sell weekly QQQ put spreads, buy VIX3M call calendars into July CPI

options.thesis: COR3M at 9.90 near cycle low — single-stock dispersion means index puts under-hedge concentrated risk.
options.signal: Long SPY put spread + long single-stock puts on MSFT/AAPL into July 11 expiry

options.thesis: Skew flattening with stock near 240 — call premium cheap relative to realized, Robotaxi narrative still alive.
options.signal: Sell ATM straddle, keep OTM call upside into Aug earnings

options.thesis: IV at 48% with stock at 195 — elevated skew into TSMC/Qualcomm prints; dealer gamma negative below 190.
options.signal: Bear put spread NVDA 195/170 July 18, defined risk into semi capex scrutiny

options.thesis: IV crush expected after +15% rip — 30-day IV 92% vs HV 65%, dealer flow turning two-way post-earnings.
options.signal: Sell MU weekly call spreads against long stock, fade IV into July

takeaway: Index levels lie. The real tape is inside the AI complex — Micron won Friday, Apple lost it, and Asia paid the bill overnight. Dispersion is the only trade until COR3M normalizes.

headline: Risk-off into the close: Apple drops 6% on OpenAI IPO delay, semis drag Nasdaq, oil bid on Oman incident.

sentiment.reason: Risk-off into the close on AI-complex fatigue, offset by Dow bid and gold strength.

movers.reason: AI capex jitters spill from NVDA
OPEC+ unwind priced in, energy bid

news.headline: Apple drops 6% as OpenAI IPO delay triggers AI complex unwind
news.context: AAPL is the largest SPX weight by market cap — a 6% drag alone explains the Nasdaq's 1.5% slide.

news.headline: Post-FOMC rhetoric tilts hawkish — MNI flags fresh hike framing
news.context: Sticks to the 'higher for longer' script; front-end repricing risk into July CPI.

news.headline: Nvidia slide signals S&P 500 risks as AI chip run slows
news.context: Semis lead the beta unwind; NVDA weakness = broader AI complex pressure into next week.

news.headline: WTI holds gains near $71.50 after cargo vessel incident near Oman
news.context: Geopolitical risk premium back in the barrel — energy the only green sector on the tape.

news.headline: Gold slips under $4,000 — fourth weekly loss on hawkish Fed, strong dollar
news.context: Haven demand fading as real yields push higher; watch $3,950 as next support.

options.thesis: $124M delta-hedged QQQ block crossed print — desks harvesting vol on semis/software.
options.signal: Premium-selling day: $280M notional sold, skew flattens, watch for dealer gamma flip.

options.thesis: VIX up 12% on the day with SPY IV lagging — dispersion trade set up.
options.signal: Long VIX / long SPY put spread into next week's jobs print.

options.thesis: Unusual call flow re-emerges on delivery chatter; July $260 strikes bid.
options.signal: Sweep activity into Friday close — narrative-trade, not flow-confirmed yet.

options.thesis: IV crushed into AI-complex selloff — vol is cheap relative to realized.
options.signal: Long straddle into next print; vol is being gifted here.

takeaway: Tape ends H1 on a sour note — AAPL-led AI unwind + hawkish Fed reframe = defensive rotation into the long weekend. Size down, watch $7,300 ES as Friday closing support.

headline: Futures green on cooling CPI, rates rally, beta bid.

sentiment.reason: Risk-off into the close on AI-complex fatigue, offset by Dow bid and gold strength.

movers.reason: AI capex jitters spill from NVDA
OPEC+ unwind priced in, energy bid

news.headline: Core CPI prints 3.1% YoY, in-line; services decelerates
news.context: Bond market likes the drift. Front-end futures now price 1 cut by year-end.

news.headline: Mega-cap tech leads, semis up 1.8% pre-market
news.context: Risk-on rotation. Small caps lagging into the open.

options.thesis: Call flow heavy on the 490/500 strikes for Jul expiry.
options.signal: Dealers long gamma — supportive of trend days.

options.thesis: IV compressed into CPI; next move likely 3–4% on follow-through.

takeaway: Soft CPI is the green light. Risk-on into close, but watch the Fed speakers at 2pm for any pushback.
